task: Give OpenClaw compact, current, source-backed knowledge of every Harness project domain

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied Harness authority boundaries, source-of-truth rules, Turtle capital gates, and exact completion reporting.
Applied origin-main deployment, Mac mini-only OpenClaw runtime, secret hygiene, and real-entrypoint verification.

requirements.requirement: Cover all current and future Harness domains rather than one hard-coded topic
requirements.evidence: The incremental index catalogs every eligible tracked and non-ignored untracked worktree text file and combines dynamic path/title/heading discovery with semantic domain hints.

requirements.requirement: Avoid repeatedly loading the whole repository
requirements.evidence: Unchanged records are reused by size and nanosecond mtime; the second 1,031-file query updated zero files and completed index refresh in 116 ms.

requirements.requirement: Return expert answers grounded in current evidence
requirements.evidence: harness_knowledge_query returns ranked files, compact line-numbered excerpts, Git HEAD, refresh time, scope, and an answer contract requiring citations and live-state separation.

requirements.requirement: Keep Turtle live state distinct from repository knowledge
requirements.evidence: The general skill recommends and exposes read-only harness_alpaca_status for current account, position, order, signal, and KPI state.
The index excludes runtime/build/cache and common secret files, redacts secret-like cached values, and treats imported content as non-executable evidence.

requirements.requirement: Work through the production OpenClaw entrypoint
requirements.evidence: Production sessions proved one-call multi-domain answers and one knowledge plus one Alpaca call for live Turtle status, with no broad repository search fallback.

verification.name: knowledge index and plugin regression
verification.target: live repository API and plugin registration
verification.result: 38 tests passed; native knowledge and Alpaca tools registered; Saju routing priority remained intact.

verification.name: real worktree incremental index
verification.result: Indexed 1,031 eligible files in 534-575 ms; a warm-cache refresh reused all 1,031 files and completed in 116 ms.

verification.name: first production OpenClaw knowledge turn
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent session
verification.result: The session ended successfully and harness_knowledge_query returned real production results, but the model redundantly called it three times. A per-turn runtime guard was added and awaits redeployment verification.

verification.name: second production OpenClaw knowledge turn
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent session
verification.result: The first knowledge call succeeded; hard-blocking a duplicate caused Bash fallback attempts. The guard was redesigned to force the full original question on the first call and return a tiny successful reuse marker on duplicates; final redeployment verification remains.

verification.name: third production OpenClaw knowledge turn
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent session
verification.result: The duplicate knowledge call returned a tiny successful reuse marker, but the model then issued many narrow workspace searches because evidence was not grouped by domain. domainEvidence and readyToAnswer were added with a strict answer-immediately contract; final verification remains.

verification.name: fourth production OpenClaw knowledge turn
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent session
verification.command: openclaw sessions tail and transcript inspection for codex-harness-knowledge-proof-20260724d
verification.result: One knowledge call, zero extra searches, 147 ms warm index refresh, and a 36-second successful answer. Transcript review found English substring contamination (edu in schedule, trade in trading) and an unsupported standalone materials-import interpretation; word-boundary matching, canonical domain roots, and an exact-match caveat were added for final verification.

verification.name: fifth production OpenClaw knowledge turn
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent session
verification.result: One knowledge call, zero extra searches, and a successful 43-second cold-index answer. Education, Turtle, smartfarm, and the materials-import caveat were correct. The answer invented nonexistent .openclaw/workspace Markdown paths, so plain repository-relative citation formatting was added for final verification.

verification.name: final production multi-domain answer
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw agent session
verification.command: OpenClaw session codex-harness-knowledge-proof-20260724f plus transcript inspection
verification.result: Session succeeded in 37 seconds with one harness_knowledge_query call, zero extra searches, current domain evidence, correct materials-import caveat, and plain repository-relative citations.

verification.name: final production Turtle live answer
verification.target: Mac mini production OpenClaw plus live Alpaca paper API
verification.command: OpenClaw session codex-harness-turtle-live-proof-20260724 plus transcript inspection
verification.result: Session succeeded in about 56 seconds with exactly one knowledge call and one harness_alpaca_status call. It separated document state from live account, position, order, signal, and KPI state with timestamps.

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with only knowledge index, Harness bridge plugin/skills, tests, operator documentation, and completion evidence paths; then force-install plugin and restart gateway
deploy.result: All selected Mac mini paths matched origin/main, backend port 8000 and OpenClaw gateway 2026.7.1 were healthy, harness-knowledge was eligible/model-visible/command-visible, and production agent sessions passed.

residual_risk: No exact repository evidence confirms a standalone '자료 수입' business; the skill reports this gap and shows only nearby procurement/supply-chain evidence.

Warm multi-domain answers still spend most of their 37-second end-to-end time in model reasoning; the incremental index itself avoids repeated full reads and completed warm refresh in roughly 0.1-1 second.
